data.body: Done definition update: Output must expose BOTH (a) the tier-keyed descendant lists AND (b) the parents-with-children predicate (equivalent to sprint-next-batch.sh's parent_ids_with_children.txt). Concrete schema option: add a top-level 'parents_with_children: [id, ...]' array, OR provide per-node has_children booleans. Consumers (specifically the next-batch subcommand, story 958a-66ac) distinguish 'parent story' from 'story needing planning' using this predicate to preserve SKIPPED_NEEDS_PLANNING behavior. Without this predicate, next-batch cannot produce correct SKIPPED_NEEDS_PLANNING output. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
